title: thelasis sphaerocarpa
intro: Thelasis sphaerocarpa, also known as the Globe-petaled Thelasis, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia. Its rhizome has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelasis sphaerocarpa include the potential treatment of fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Thelasis sphaerocarpa can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
